title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 07 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 07 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 07 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/09/2021
DCE iron ore futures rose slightly today, the spot price in the morning has decreased by around 30yuan/mt over yesterday. Some traders slightlyincrease the quotation and narrow their bargain space today. PBF at Shandong port dealt 975-995yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 1050yuan/mt, up 10-25yuan/mt; PBF at Jiangnei port dealt 1000yuan/mt.
